serverInfo.name: Pentagonal
serverInfo.description: Sovereign smart contract forge and token intelligence platform. AI-powered 8-agent security audits, contract generation, compilation, and live token data for Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, and BSC.

authentication.notes: Audit and generate cost $5 each (x402 USDC on Base or credit). Fix, compile, lookup, rules, chains are free (rate limited).

tools.name: pentagonal_lookup
tools.description: One-stop token intelligence. Fetches price, market cap, ATH, 24h volume, transaction counts, holders, liquidity, LP lock status, security flags (honeypot, taxes, mintable, self-destruct), socials, and verified source code for any token by contract address.

chain.description: Chain ID: ethereum, polygon, base, arbitrum, optimism, bsc, solana

tools.name: pentagonal_audit
tools.description: Run a full 8-agent security pen test on a smart contract. Agents specialize in reentrancy, flash loans, access control, gas griefing, oracle manipulation, MEV/front-running, integer overflow, and economic exploits.

code.description: Solidity or Anchor/Rust source code to audit

chain.description: Chain target: ethereum, solana, polygon, etc.

tools.name: pentagonal_generate
tools.description: Generate a production-quality smart contract from a natural language description. Supports EVM (Solidity/OpenZeppelin) and Solana (Anchor/Rust or SPL token config).

prompt.description: Natural language description of the contract

tools.name: pentagonal_fix
tools.description: Fix a specific vulnerability in a smart contract while preserving all existing functionality.

tools.name: pentagonal_compile
tools.description: Compile Solidity source code to ABI, bytecode, constructor arguments, and gas estimates.

tools.name: pentagonal_rules
tools.description: View the accumulated security rules knowledge base. Grows with every audit run.

tools.name: pentagonal_chains
tools.description: List all supported blockchains with chain IDs, explorer URLs, and deployment details.
